title: ICAR CRRI Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Young Professional I Posts
description: ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute has declared the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Young Professional I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the ICAR CRRI Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, ...
